suppress.notes: CVE-2026-54515 affects com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind when case-insensitive property matching is enabled with per-property @JsonIgnoreProperties exclusions. As of 2026-07-03, the upstream patched Jackson 2 versions named by GHSA-5jmj-h7xm-6q6v are not published in Maven Central. The application explicitly disables case-insensitive properties in spring.jackson.mapper.accept-case-insensitive-properties.
